code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

print("sum_even=#{sum}")
